scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Charles Bridge was built in 1357! Touch the bronze statue of St. John for good luck. Best views at sunrise!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 카를교는 1357년에 지어졌어요! 성 요한 동상을 만지면 행운이 와요. 일출 때 전망이 최고예요!

choices.text: I'll definitely touch it for luck!

scenes.npcDialog: Beer spa! Soak in beer, barley, and hops. It's great for your skin! And yes, you can drink unlimited beer while bathing.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비어 스파! 맥주, 보리, 홉에서 목욕해요. 피부에 좋아요! 그리고 목욕하면서 무제한 맥주 마실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Drinking beer while bathing in beer? Only in Prague!
Is it really good for the skin?
I don't want to smell like beer.

scenes.npcDialog: Kafka was born here in Prague! The rotating head sculpture downtown is amazing. His stories capture the city's mysterious atmosphere.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 카프카는 프라하에서 태어났어요! 시내에 회전하는 두상 조각이 멋져요. 그의 이야기는 도시의 신비로운 분위기를 담고 있어요.

choices.text: I must see the rotating head sculpture!
Prague definitely has that mysterious atmosphere.
Kafka is too dark for me.

scenes.npcDialog: First time staying at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes! Is it usually lively here?
What's the vibe like at night?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something off the beaten path?

choices.text: Yes! Where do locals hang out?
I only go to famous places.
Hidden places are hidden for a reason.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have travel insurance?

choices.text: Not yet. What coverage do you offer?
Nothing bad will happen to me.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Your room is ready. Would you like an upgrade to a suite for 50 euros more?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 안녕하세요! 객실 준비되었습니다. 50유로 추가하시면 스위트룸으로 업그레이드 가능한데요?

choices.text: That sounds nice. What does the suite include?
What's the difference between the rooms?
Give me the upgrade for free.

scenes.npcDialog: The regular line is about 2 hours. Would you like skip-the-line tickets?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 일반 줄은 약 2시간 기다려야 해요. 줄 안서는 티켓 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much extra is it?
Definitely, I don't want to wait.
I should get VIP for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Prague Castle is the largest ancient castle in the world! Don't miss St. Vitus Cathedral inside. The changing of the guard is at noon.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 프라하 성은 세계 최대의 고대 성이에요! 안에 있는 성 비투스 대성당 놓치지 마세요. 근위병 교대식은 정오예요.

choices.text: The largest castle in the world? Amazing!
When is the best time to visit the cathedral?

scenes.situation: 아르누보 거장 알폰스 뮤샤의 작품을 감상한다
scenes.npcDialog: Alphonse Mucha is Prague's most famous artist! His Art Nouveau style inspired the world. The Slav Epic is his masterpiece.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 알폰스 뮤샤는 프라하의 가장 유명한 예술가예요! 그의 아르누보 스타일은 세계에 영향을 줬어요. 슬라브 서사시가 걸작이에요.

choices.text: His Art Nouveau posters are iconic!
Where can I see the Slav Epic?

scenes.npcDialog: Letná Park has the best views of the bridges! There's a giant metronome where Stalin's statue used to be. Bring a picnic!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 레트나 공원에서 다리 전망이 최고예요! 스탈린 동상 있던 자리에 거대한 메트로놈이 있어요. 피크닉 추천!

choices.text: A picnic with that view sounds perfect!
The metronome replacing Stalin is so symbolic.

scenes.npcDialog: Where are you heading next?

choices.text: I'm thinking about Paris. Any tips?
Not sure yet. What do you recommend?

scenes.npcDialog: How long are you planning to stay?

choices.text: Maybe a week. Do you offer any discounts for longer stays?

scenes.npcDialog: Heading out for the night?

choices.text: Yes. Are there any areas I should avoid?
Is it safe to walk around at night?

scenes.npcDialog: How may I assist you this evening?

choices.text: Could you recommend a nice restaurant nearby?
Can you make a reservation for me?
You should know what I want.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a spa treatment?

choices.text: Yes, what massage options do you have?
I'd like a 60-minute deep tissue massage.
Spas are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Try our svíčková! It's beef in creamy vegetable sauce with dumplings. Pair it with a Pilsner - beer is cheaper than water here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스비치코바 드셔보세요! 크림 야채 소스 소고기에 만두예요. 필스너 맥주랑 같이 드세요 - 맥주가 물보다 싸요!

choices.text: Beer cheaper than water? I'll take both!
Svíčková sounds delicious. I'll try it!

scenes.npcDialog: Havelská Market has been here since 1232! Bohemian crystal, marionettes, garnet jewelry - all traditional Czech crafts.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 하벨 시장은 1232년부터 있었어요! 보헤미안 크리스탈, 마리오네트, 가넷 보석 - 다 전통 체코 공예품이에요.

choices.text: I'd love to see the Bohemian crystal!
What's special about garnet jewelry here?

scenes.npcDialog: Beer gardens are Czech culture! Try kulajda - creamy mushroom soup. And our pork knee is roasted for 8 hours!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비어 가든은 체코 문화예요! 쿨라이다 드세요 - 크림 버섯 수프요. 돼지 무릎은 8시간 구워요!

scenes.npcDialog: Need a ride? Where are you going?

choices.text: I'm trying to get to the next town. Can you help?

scenes.npcDialog: Need to do some laundry?

choices.text: How much does a load cost?

scenes.npcDialog: You picked a great time to visit! The festival is this weekend!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좋은 때 오셨네요! 이번 주말에 축제예요!

choices.text: That's lucky! Where does it take place?
I don't care about local culture.

scenes.npcDialog: Room service, how may I help you?

choices.text: I'd like to order breakfast for tomorrow morning.
Could I get a bottle of wine sent up?
Bring me everything on the menu.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you visiting from abroad? You may be eligible for tax refund.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 해외에서 오셨나요? 택스 리펀 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Yes, how do I get the tax refund?
Can you prepare the documents for me?
Just give me the discount now.

scenes.npcDialog: The Astronomical Clock strikes every hour with a show! It's from 1410 - the world's oldest working one. Stay for the full performance!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 천문 시계는 매시간 쇼를 해요! 1410년 것 - 세계에서 가장 오래된 작동하는 시계예요. 끝까지 보세요!

choices.text: 600 years old and still working? Incredible!
What time does the next show start?

scenes.npcDialog: The John Lennon Wall started after his death in 1980. Beatles lyrics, peace symbols - it's constantly changing. Feel free to add your message!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 존 레논 벽은 1980년 그의 사후에 시작됐어요. 비틀즈 가사, 평화 상징 - 계속 바뀌어요. 메시지 남기셔도 돼요!

choices.text: Can I really add my own message?
This is such a meaningful place.

scenes.situation: 프라하 특유의 블랙 라이트 극장을 관람한다
scenes.npcDialog: Black light theater is uniquely Czech! Performers in black become invisible, objects float magically. No language needed to enjoy!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 블랙 라이트 극장은 체코만의 것이에요! 검은 옷 입은 배우는 안 보이고, 물체가 마법처럼 떠다녀요. 언어 몰라도 OK!

choices.text: That sounds like a magical experience!
Perfect - I don't speak Czech anyway!

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Make yourself at home. Here's your couch.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영해요! 편하게 있어요. 여기가 당신 자리예요.

choices.text: Thank you so much for hosting me!
This is so kind of you. Can I help with anything?

scenes.npcDialog: Where are you headed next?

choices.text: What's the cheapest way to get to Berlin?
When's the next bus to Prague?
Just tell me where to go.

scenes.npcDialog: Checking out? Need to store your bags?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick them up this evening before my bus.
How late can I pick up my bags?
I don't trust you with my bags.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to business class check-in. May I see your passport?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 클래스 체크인에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 여권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Is the lounge open now?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the lounge. May I see your boarding pass?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 탑승권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Where are the showers?
Is there a quiet area to work?

scenes.npcDialog: Josefov has one of Europe's oldest synagogues. The Old Jewish Cemetery has 12,000 headstones in layers. It's deeply moving.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 요세포프에는 유럽에서 가장 오래된 회당 중 하나가 있어요. 오래된 유대인 묘지에는 12,000개 비석이 층층이 있어요.

choices.text: The history here is so significant.
Is there a combined ticket for all sites?
I'm not interested in religious sites.

scenes.situation: 체코 맥주의 본고장에서 다양한 맥주를 맛본다
scenes.npcDialog: Czech Republic drinks the most beer per capita! Try Pilsner Urquell - it's the original pilsner. Or Kozel for something darker.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 체코는 1인당 맥주 소비 세계 1위예요! 필스너 우르켈 드세요 - 필스너의 원조예요. 더 진한 건 코젤이요.

choices.text: I'll try the original Pilsner Urquell!
What's the difference between Czech and German beer?

scenes.situation: 관광객이 적은 프라하의 또 다른 성을 방문한다
scenes.npcDialog: Vyšehrad is less crowded than Prague Castle! Beautiful cemetery where famous Czechs rest. Amazing river views too.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비셰흐라드는 프라하 성보다 한적해요! 유명한 체코인들이 묻힌 아름다운 묘지도 있어요. 강 전망도 끝내줘요.

choices.text: I'd love to escape the tourist crowds.
If it's not famous, why bother?

scenes.npcDialog: You're not from around here, are you? Where are you from?

choices.text: I'm from Korea! Is this your hometown?
I'm traveling through. What's this area like?
Why do you want to know?

scenes.npcDialog: Passport please. Where are you traveling from?

choices.text: I'm traveling from the Netherlands. Here's my passport.
Why do you need my passport?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, reservation for Kim at 7 PM.
I booked a table for two.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your rental car. Would you like additional insurance coverage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 렌터카 여기 있습니다. 추가 보험 들으시겠어요?

choices.text: What does the full coverage include?
Yes, I'd like the comprehensive insurance.

scenes.npcDialog: Trdelník is our famous chimney cake! Warm, crispy, with cinnamon sugar. Want ice cream inside? That's the Prague special!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 트르들로는 유명한 굴뚝 빵이에요! 따뜻하고, 바삭하고, 시나몬 설탕이요. 안에 아이스크림 넣을까요? 프라하 스페셜!

choices.text: Is it traditional or a tourist thing?

scenes.npcDialog: Petřín Tower looks like a mini Eiffel Tower! Take the funicular up, then climb 299 steps for panoramic views of all Prague.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 페트린 타워는 미니 에펠탑 같아요! 케이블카로 올라가서 299계단 오르면 프라하 전경이 다 보여요.

choices.text: The funicular sounds like a great start.

scenes.npcDialog: Strahov Library is breathtaking! Two baroque halls with ancient books. They also brew their own beer here - monastic tradition!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스트라호프 도서관은 숨막히게 아름다워요! 고서가 있는 바로크 홀 두 개. 여기서 맥주도 직접 양조해요 - 수도원 전통!

choices.text: A library and brewery in a monastery? Perfect!
I've heard this is one of the world's most beautiful libraries.
I'm not interested in old books.

scenes.npcDialog: There's a free concert tonight at the square!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 밤 광장에서 무료 콘서트 있어요!

choices.text: That sounds great! What time does it start?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'd like to ask about extending my visa.
What documents do I need for a visa extension?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try our tasting menu with wine pairing?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 와인 페어링과 함께하는 테이스팅 메뉴 드셔보시겠어요?

choices.text: That sounds wonderful. What wines are included?
Yes, please. Is there a vegetarian option?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like valet parking for your vehicle?

choices.text: Yes, please. How much is it per day?
Valet parking is for lazy people.

scenes.npcDialog: Tram 22 is the scenic route! It passes all major sites - Castle, Old Town, river views. Buy a 24-hour pass for unlimited rides.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 22번 트램이 관광 루트예요! 성, 구시가지, 강 뷰 다 지나요. 24시간 패스로 무제한 타세요.

choices.text: Tram 22 sounds like the best way to see the city!

scenes.npcDialog: Prague is the city of music! Mozart premiered Don Giovanni here. Tonight's performance is in a beautiful baroque church.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 프라하는 음악의 도시예요! 모차르트가 돈 조반니를 여기서 초연했어요. 오늘 공연은 아름다운 바로크 교회에서 해요.

choices.text: A concert in a baroque church sounds magical!
I didn't know Mozart performed here.

scenes.npcDialog: Enjoying the street performance?

choices.text: It's amazing! Should I tip them?

scenes.npcDialog: Need a local SIM card?

choices.text: How much data do I get for 10 euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Shall I call a taxi for you, or would you prefer to use the app?

choices.text: Please call a taxi. I'm going to the opera house.
I'll use the app. What's the address here?
I'll walk... no, actually drive me.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to deliver your luggage directly to your hotel?

choices.text: That would be great! How long does it take?
Yes, what time will it arrive?
Why would I pay for that?

scenes.npcDialog: What'll it be? We have local craft beer on tap.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 뭘로 드릴까요? 지역 수제 맥주 있어요.

choices.text: I'll try the local beer. What do you recommend?

scenes.npcDialog: Forgot something?

choices.text: Do you have a charger I could borrow?
Is there a universal adapter at reception?
My phone died and it's your fault.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private guide for your city tour?

choices.text: Yes, can the guide speak Korean?
How much is a private half-day tour?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
